permissions._comment: MODEL (v3.5): Bash(*) allows all bash so runs flow without operator/env prompts. SAFETY = the deny list (deny overrides allow): git push/merge/force DENIED (mechanical wall — human pushes after local review); home-dir reads (~/.nvm,.ssh,.aws,.config,etc) DENIED (no probing your machine); destroyers (rm -rf, publish, deploy) DENIED; in-project secrets (.env, auth, payments) DENIED. ALWAYS GATED: Edit(.claude/settings.json) stays in 'ask' so an agent can't silently rewrite these rules and remove the walls. This is Professor's allow-all-bash smoothness BUT keeping the mechanical git gate instead of Professor's prose gate — stronger, costs nothing.

hooks.command: f=$(ls -t ventures/*/STATE.md 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -n "$f" ] && grep -qiE 're-?tier|rejected|REVISE|FAIL|escalat' "$f" 2>/dev/null; then if [ ! -f .claude/memory/learnings.md ] || [ "$f" -nt .claude/memory/learnings.md ]; then echo 'NUDGE (Hermes-style): a stage surfaced a lesson (re-tier/rejection/failure/escalation) but learnings.md was not updated. Distill ONE declarative, cross-venture fact into .claude/memory/learnings.md before ending. Facts not imperatives; skip anything stale in a week.'; fi; fi || true
